subcodes.first_line: O dear and discerning friend! By the life of God, verily the heart overflows with love for the chosen ones of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الادیب الحبیب اللبیب لعمر الله ان القلب لطافح بمحبه اصفیاء الله و ان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @symbolism, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @light and darkness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
